name: BTT SKR Mini E3 V3.0
marlin_ref_note: Built from Marlin bugfix-2.1.x for consistency across AnglerOS boards.
flash_hint: Copy the firmware .bin to a FAT32 microSD card, insert it into the board, and power-cycle. It flashes on boot and renames the file to FIRMWARE.CUR.
notes: Integrated TMC2209 drivers on a shared UART; pins handled by the board's pins file.
